_comment: Committed connection config — env-var placeholders ONLY, never a real token (tracked file). The gateway connection authenticates when AURA_MCP_TOKEN is set (an aura_... management token minted in Aura → Fleet → Agent Tokens): on devices via the shell env, in claude.ai cloud environments via the environment's env vars. The :- default keeps the config parseable when the variable is unset — the connection then simply fails auth and shows as unavailable in /mcp until the token is provided. See files/references/connect.md for token minting, scoping, and the high-risk-write opt-in.
